author.name: David Saykin
author.email: saykind at itp dot ac dot ru

entry.title: SNSF quiz answers
entry.content:
When student starts to work in SNSF cleanroom, he has to take a quiz to get access. In theory, it should be possible to answer the questions after reading provided manual, but in practice it is not possible. I used Python package called Selenium to brute-force the quiz and now I share the answers to save you some time.

Answers

  • NPCR Intake
  • Wet benches
  • KJL evaporator

author.name: David Saykin
author.email: saykind at itp dot ac dot ru

entry.summary: When student starts to work in SNSF cleanroom, he has to take a quiz to get access. In theory, it should be possible to answer the questions after reading provided manual, but in practice it is not possible. I used Python package called Selenium to brute-force the quiz and now I share the answers to save you some time.
